item.title: 15ai
item.description: 15ai is the hosting website for the model DeepThroat, a text-to-speech model that learns from as little as 15 seconds of speech data for a specific voice.

item.title: Sanctuary
item.description: Sanctuary is a company that has recently received its first round of funding for the purpose of creating AGI. Official Website VentureBeat: Sanctuary claims it’s creating robots with human-level intelligence, but experts are skeptical
